# Are Your WordPress Backups Safe?

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-11-27 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 333

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Are you making WordPress backups the right way?

Too often, I log into a client’s website only to discover
loopholes in the way they set up a backup.

Either they only keep an onsite backup (that is, they do not keep
a backup copy out of their hosting), or they have no backup at
all.

Some people also think that they can just rely on their hosting
company’s backups.

If you really want to secure your website, you’ll need to ensure
that you keep your own backup copy externally.

That’s why I highly recommend using Duplicator 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..4jzp1s2rweM64oJHr14JR8t4uwSgyFPHBN6MIUMY0k4 ).

Using Duplicator is like having an 'Undo' button - but for your
entire WordPress site! It creates reliable, rock-solid backups
that you can restore with just a few clicks.

* It lets you schedule an automated backup. Once you set it, you
can forget about it.
* Integration with third-party cloud storage services, like
Google Drive or Dropbox.
* Instantly restore a backup with a click of a button.

Duplicator is offering a 65% discount this Black Friday.

Now is the perfect time to secure your website with Duplicator.

Get Duplicator Pro This Black Friday (65% OFF) 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..4jzp1s2rweM64oJHr14JR8t4uwSgyFPHBN6MIUMY0k4 )

What are you waiting for? Start making offsite backups and secure
your website today.

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi,
Founder of WPBeginner
